first_greeting.text: To once have been so large...
Oh, would you look at that, a visitor.
...These are matters which do not concern you, Warrior.

Return once you have learned what following the path gets you.
I will let you know when I have more to say.

no_more_0.text: Not now, Warrior. I shall let you know when I have more you should know.

Now, do not disturb my slumber yet.
Time will come, soon.

after_1.text:
Mh, I can see you've made progress.
You are becoming familiar with this game of... his, it seems
There are more minions that are awaiting your arrival.

They look so different now.
And to think that this all was once...

The fated battle draws near, Warrior.
The prophecy doesn't wait for anyone, and time is running.

...And with it, soon enough...
All will come back to where it started.
You will soon come to find that, even in times of shining wealth, every reign comes to an end
Except of the one of he who perseveres.

no_more_1.text: Well, I'm afraid there's nothing more that I can tell, Warrior.
I am bound to the confines of this bird-cage.

If doing so is in your will...
 Attend the party for me, will you?

And when you meet the host...
Remind him that he owes me a visit.

after_2.text:
You have penetrated his walls...
You have revealed the path.
And now, you will meet face to face.

The puppetmaster...
Do yo see through his lies?
Or are you too enjoying his show?

Puppets always think they are the ones in control anyways.
Then, attend to his so called party

Time must past, and you shall see.
All will fade, and we will come right back to our places here.

But when the time comes...
Next time...
A fake prophecy won't be there to save you, Warrior.
